sp_widget.description: This widget provides a wizard to create and edit volumes
sp_widget.name: MSP ID Create Volume
sp_widget.template:
${{{data.title}}}: {{data.modal_title}}

  • ${Type}
  • ${Users}
  • ${Size}
  • ${Project}
  • ${Name}
  • ${Hosts}
  • ${Confirmation}
${You need to select a host to complete volume configuration.}
${When attaching to multiple hosts, they must be configured in cluster mode and run the same OS}
${{{data.errorMessage}}}
${Select the type of volume that you would like to create}:
${Which users are allowed to connect to it?}
${Username} ${Permissions}
{{user.username}}
${You don't have free space. Would you like to enable on-demand?}
${Maximum allowed size per volume: 25.000 GB}
${Maximum allowed size per volume: 25 TB}

${Which size?}

{{getAlocationUsage()}} {{data.measurement}} ${of} {{data.volume.total_size}} {{data.measurement}} ${used}
GB
TB
* ${Volume size is required!} * ${Size can't be less than} {{data.volume.min_size}}! ${The Block storage protocol does not allow reduction} * ${Size can't be more than} {{data.volume.max_size}}!
Expansão e Redução volume block:

Devido a particularidades necessarias no sistema operacional sobre o Filesystem montado em volumes do tipo Block (iSCSI), o processo de expansão / redução não é permitido pelo portal de autoserviço. Recomendamos a utilização dos serviços de suporte Equinix atraves do 0800 e/ou abertura de chamado por este portal, e caso voçê esteja familiarizado com procedimentos de expansão/redução em filesystens, executar:

  • Criar novo volume block (iSCSI) no portal;
  • Apresentar novo volume block (iSCSI) ao mesmo host;
  • Reconhecer novo volume block (iSCSI) no host;
  • Através das ferramentas de sistema operacional, expandir filesystem existente com novo volume apresentado.
${Pick an existing project}
${Not found? Register a new project}
${Create a new project}
${Cancel}
${How do you want to identify it?}
${Volume name is required!} ${The volume name must be unique!}


${If the LUN ID is changed, the disk will lose connection with the host, making it essential to perform a new scan on the volume.}

${Which hosts will be connected to it?}
Hostname ${IP Address} IQN
{{host.display_value}}
${Save} ${Cancel}
${Click to define IP*(s)}*
${Save} ${Cancel}
{{host.iqn}} ${Click to define IQN}
${Verify your volume settings}

${Name}
{{data.volume.name}}

${Size}
{{data.volume.size}} {{data.measurement}}

${Type}
{{type}}

${Project}
{{data.volume.project.name}}

${Users}
{{user.username}}

${Name}
{{data.volume.name}}

${Size}
{{data.volume.size}} {{data.measurement}}

${Type}
{{type}}

${Project}
{{data.volume.project.name}}

${IPs} ${Hosts}

{{ip}} ${No IP selected}

{{host.display_value}} ({{host.iqn}})

${Your volume creation was requested successfully} ${Your volume edition was requested successfully}

${Operation successful. Please note that changes can take up to 5 minutes to be reflected on the portal list.}
${You can track the status on the volumes list}

${Unable to Create Volume}

${We identified an error while performing the action. Please, before trying again, make sure the error below can be corrected.}

{{msgErroEAR}}


${Create new users} ${Missing IP Address?} ${Click here to open a support ticket}
